category_sources: Official X.Org man page describes xeyes as a follow-the-mouse X demo.
source_facts.description says it is an X demo using the X SHAPE extension.
display_name_sources: Official X.Org man page name is xeyes.
docs_sources: Official X.Org manual page for xeyes.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official freedesktop GitLab xorg/app/xeyes repository URL.
tags_sources: Official X.Org man page documents xeyes as an X demo and options for SHAPE/Xrender behavior.
